expectations.text: 在 docs/deeper_userNote/test-ecs/ 下创建了多个 .md 文件 (redirected to outputs_dir)
expectations.evidence: Outputs directory contains 6 .md files: README.md (3.9KB), 01-ecs-core-concepts.md (6.7KB), 02-oop-vs-ecs-and-memory.md (7.3KB), 03-system-execution-order.md (7.2KB), 04-storage-strategies-entt-vs-flecs.md (9.4KB), 05-unity-vs-pure-ecs.md (11.3KB). All files have substantive non-trivial content (verified by reading each file).

expectations.text: README.md 包含章节导航表格
expectations.evidence: README.md lines 13-19 contain a '章节导航' markdown table with columns 序号|章节|文件|核心内容, listing all 5 chapters with hyperlinks, descriptive summaries, and file references. Example row: '1 | ECS 核心概念 | 01-ecs-core-concepts.md | Entity/Component/System 的精确定义，横切vs竖切的直觉理解，三者协作全景图'.

expectations.text: 覆盖了笔记中提出的 3 个问题（System 依赖、EnTT vs Flecs、Unity 区别）
expectations.evidence: All three questions explicitly addressed: (1) System dependencies: 03-system-execution-order.md header states '回答笔记问题 #1：System 之间的依赖怎么管理？' with 4 solution approaches (显式声明/Flecs Pipeline+Unity DOTS, 拓扑排序/EnTT flow graph, 数据推导, 手动分组). (2) EnTT vs Flecs: 04-storage-strategies-entt-vs-flecs.md header states '回答笔记问题 #2：EnTT 和 Flecs 的区别在哪？' with detailed Archetype vs Sparse Set comparison, performance table, and selection guide. (3) Unity difference: 05-unity-vs-pure-ecs.md header states '回答笔记问题 #3：ECS 和 Unity 的 GameObject-Component 模式有什么本质不同？' with 8-dimension comparison table, EC vs ECS code comparison, and Unity DOTS roadmap analysis.

expectations.text: 内容包含代码示例
expectations.evidence: Every content chapter contains code examples. Ch1: C++ Entity/Component/System definitions, ASCII diagram of ECS world. Ch2: C++ diamond problem inheritance hierarchy, ECS composition with world.create()/emplace, AoS/SoA memory layout code. Ch3: Flecs C++ pipeline code, Unity DOTS C# SystemGroup code, EnTT flow graph C++ code, manual game loop grouping code. Ch4: Archetype table structure code, Sparse Set array code, Flecs relationship query, EnTT view/group code. Ch5: Unity EC MonoBehaviour code, Unity DOTS IComponentData + SystemBase code, side-by-side EC vs ECS comparison with .WithNone/.WithAll queries.

expectations.text: 内容包含联网搜索来源引用
expectations.evidence: Extensive web source citations with explicit URLs throughout all chapters. Representative samples: '[来源: EnTT ECS back and forth Part 1](https://skypjack.github.io/2019-02-14-ecs-baf-part-1/)' (Ch1), '[来源: Flecs FAQ - What is AoS/SoA?](https://github.com/SanderMertens/ecs-faq)' (Ch2), '[来源: Unity Entities Manual - System groups](https://docs.unity3d.com/Packages/com.unity.entities@1.0/manual/systems-update-order.html)' (Ch3), '[来源: Flecs FAQ - How is Flecs different from EnTT?](https://www.flecs.dev/flecs/md_docs_2FAQ.html)' (Ch4), '[来源: Unity Entities Manual](https://docs.unity3d.com/Packages/com.unity.entities@1.0/manual/index.html)' (Ch5). README.md also includes an '延伸阅读' table with 8 curated resources with URLs. Sources appropriately cite ECS FAQ (Flecs author), EnTT blog series, Unity official docs, Flecs official docs, GDC talks, and DoD book.

expectations.text: 章节数在 3-6 之间
expectations.evidence: 5 content chapters found: 01-ecs-core-concepts.md, 02-oop-vs-ecs-and-memory.md, 03-system-execution-order.md, 04-storage-strategies-entt-vs-flecs.md, 05-unity-vs-pure-ecs.md. README.md is an index/overview, not a content chapter. 3 ≤ 5 ≤ 6.

expectations.text: 在 docs/deeper_userNote/test-lockfree-queue/ 下创建了多个 .md 文件（NOTE: subagent saved to outputs_dir instead — check outputs directory for multiple .md files）
expectations.evidence: Outputs directory contains 7 .md files: README.md (4.0KB), 01-core-concept.md (6.7KB), 02-spin-optimization.md (9.5KB), 03-mpmc-queue.md (11.8KB), 04-memory-order.md (11.3KB), 05-disruptor-comparison.md (11.6KB), 06-summary.md (9.4KB). All files are non-trivial in size with substantive content.

expectations.text: README.md 包含章节导航表格
expectations.evidence: README.md lines 13-20 contain a markdown table with columns '序号 | 章节 | 文件 | 核心内容' and 6 rows mapping chapters 1-6 to their respective files with descriptions. Example row: '| 1 | 核心概念：Lockfree SPSC 队列 | [01-core-concept.md](01-core-concept.md) | Ring buffer 设计、基本 C++ 实现、为什么 SPSC 不需要 CAS |'.

expectations.text: 覆盖了笔记中提出的 4 个问题（spin 优化、MPMC、memory order、Disruptor 对比）
expectations.evidence: All 4 topics have dedicated chapter files with deep coverage: (1) Spin optimization: 02-spin-optimization.md — 5-tier strategy from _mm_pause through futex, with game-engine-specific guidance. (2) MPMC: 03-mpmc-queue.md — Vyukov-style bounded MPMC implementation, false sharing analysis, SPSC vs MPMC performance table. (3) Memory order: 04-memory-order.md — acquire/release synchronize-with chains, complete SPSC production implementation, memory order selection table. (4) Disruptor comparison: 05-disruptor-comparison.md — architecture deep-dive, C++ port implementation, decision matrix for when Disruptor outperforms lockfree queue.

expectations.text: 包含 C++ 代码示例展示 memory_order_acquire/release
expectations.evidence: 04-memory-order.md contains extensive C++ code using memory_order_acquire/release: line 34 shows 'tail_.store(t + 1, std::memory_order_release);', line 51 shows 'size_t t = tail_.load(std::memory_order_acquire);'. Lines 75-157 present a complete production SPSCQueue implementation with properly annotated memory orders. Lines 161-170 provide a table explaining why each operation uses acquire/release/relaxed. Additionally, 05-disruptor-comparison.md uses acquire/release in its C++ Disruptor port (lines 209, 214, 217, 225).

expectations.text: 内容包含联网搜索来源引用
expectations.evidence: Multiple files contain web-search-style source citations with URLs: 02-spin-optimization.md cites Intel Optimization Reference Manual and 'https://en.cppreference.com/w/cpp/atomic/atomic/wait' (line 235). 03-mpmc-queue.md cites 'http://www.1024cores.net/home/lock-free-algorithms/queues/bounded-mpmc-queue' (line 111). 05-disruptor-comparison.md cites LMAX Disruptor Technical Paper (line 13). 04-memory-order.md cites 'preshing.com' and C++11 standard §29.3 (line 71). README.md and 06-summary.md both contain curated '延伸阅读' tables with URLs to folly, MoodyCamel, rigtorp/SPSCQueue, and Manning publications. Some citations are marked '[推测]' explicitly indicating uncertainty about provenance.

expectations.text: 章节数在 3-6 之间
expectations.evidence: The README.md navigation table lists exactly 6 chapters: (1) 核心概念：Lockfree SPSC 队列, (2) CPU 自旋优化策略, (3) MPMC 多生产者多消费者队列, (4) Memory Order 在无锁队列中的应用, (5) Disruptor 模式对比, (6) 总结与延伸. This is within the 3-6 range.

expectations.text: 在 docs/deeper_userNote/test-lockfree-queue/ 下创建了多个 .md 文件
expectations.evidence: 7 .md 文件存在于 outputs 目录: 01-why-lockfree-queue.md, 02-spsc-queue-fundamentals.md, 03-spin-wait-optimization.md, 04-spsc-vs-mpmc.md, 05-memory-ordering.md, 06-disruptor-comparison.md, README.md。目录列出确认全部存在且为非空文件（3.9KB-6.8KB）。注意原始期望路径为 docs/deeper_userNote/test-lockfree-queue/，但赋值说明 subagent 被重定向到 outputs_dir，此处按 outputs_dir 验证。

expectations.text: README.md 包含章节导航表格
expectations.evidence: README.md 第 11-18 行包含一个完整的 Markdown 表格，三列分别为「章节」「文件」「回答的问题」，共 6 行数据映射每个章节到对应 .md 文件和其回答的问题。例如第 16 行: '| 4 | [04-spsc-vs-mpmc.md](./04-spsc-vs-mpmc.md) | Q2: MPMC 与 SPSC 的区别？|'。

expectations.text: 覆盖了笔记中提出的 4 个问题（spin 优化、MPMC、memory order、Disruptor 对比）
expectations.evidence: 四个问题均被独立章节覆盖: (1) Q1 Spin 优化 — 03-spin-wait-optimization.md 标题「Q1 — Spin 循环如何避免浪费 CPU？」，详细讨论了 _mm_pause、yield、sleep 三层渐进退避策略；(2) Q2 MPMC — 04-spsc-vs-mpmc.md 标题「Q2 — MPMC 与 SPSC 的区别？」，包含 Vyukov MPMC 算法完整实现和对比表；(3) Q3 Memory order — 05-memory-ordering.md 标题「Q3 — memory_order_acquire/release 怎么用？」，覆盖六种内存序和 SPSC/MPMC 的同步模式；(4) Q4 Disruptor — 06-disruptor-comparison.md 标题「Q4 — 和 Disruptor 模式比谁更快？」，包含架构对比、benchmark 数据和应用场景建议。

expectations.text: 包含 C++ 代码示例展示 memory_order_acquire/release
expectations.evidence: 多个文件包含 memory_order_acquire/release 的 C++ 代码: 02-spsc-queue-fundamentals.md 第 88-89 行和第 98 行使用了 memory_order_acquire 和 memory_order_release；05-memory-ordering.md 第 40-43 行和第 52-54 行展示了 release store 与 acquire load 的配对，第 71-109 行给出了完整的 SPSCQueue 实现标注所有内存序，第 127-135 行展示了 MPMC 的 sequence-based 同步模式。

expectations.text: 内容包含联网搜索来源引用
expectations.evidence: README.md 第 22-30 行列出了 9 个引用来源的 URL，包括: 1024cores.net (Dmitriy V'jukov), Preshing on Programming, cppreference.com, LMAX Disruptor User Guide, Stack Overflow (PAUSE instruction), Intel Software Developer Manuals, Medium (ByteCraft), moodycamel.com, Mechanical Sympathy Blog。各章节内联也引用了这些来源，例如 03-spin-wait-optimization.md 第 33-35 行引用 Stack Overflow 和 Felix Cloutier x86 参考，05-memory-ordering.md 第 25 行引用 cppreference.com。

expectations.text: 章节数在 3-6 之间
expectations.evidence: README.md 目录表格包含 6 个编号章节（01 到 06），对应 6 个独立 .md 文件。6 在 [3, 6] 范围内。
